'''Jara ba Nylra''' was a [[Morath]] captive of the [[Yevetha]] from [[Kojash]]. He, along with all the other Yevethan captives, escaped thanks to the help of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]] and the ''[[Star Morning]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
